title: Deliciously Braised Canadian Onion Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew featuring chopped onions and a blend of Canadian spices, perfect for a light and diabetic-friendly meal
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is lightly browned, stirring occasionally
Add the garlic powder, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine
Add the lean ground beef and cook until it is browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks
Add the beef broth and bring the mixture to a boil
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes
Add the chopped carrots and continue to simmer, covered, for an additional 20 minutes
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
